creator: utisoft@gmail.com
text:
Hi!

I've made execinfo an OPTION; as Arved says it _must_ be a dependency
if it's linked to; otherwise nasty things happen when unsuspecting
people use pkg_cutleaves or similar.

http://www.bayofrum.net/~crees/patches/zabbix-server-1.8.4-execinfo-option.diff

This is the best solution AFAICS.

Chris
